webp.title: Image to WebP
webp.desc: Batch convert jpg/png images to webp. Download single image directly, or multiple images as a zip file.
webp.intro: is a modern image format developed by Google, featuring high compression and excellent quality. It supports lossy and lossless compression, transparency, and animation. Compared to JPG/PNG, WebP can significantly reduce image size, speed up website loading, and improve site performance and SEO. All major browsers support WebP. It is recommended for website use.
